name: families_active lists the umbrella families a named framework activates, distinct from the technology list
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a dashboard with Vue" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(d["families_active"]==["frontend"] && d["workload_classification"]["family_activated"]==["vue"] ? 0:1)' && echo families-active-umbrellas 1>&2
